commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=9f4fc8f9bdff30c6bdb00e817e93f79741ac79ee)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Kimi Code OAuth credential refresh, Kimi source and tier labels, Kimi Code and Pi local session token-cost reporting, settings toggles, docs, and focused tests.

Reproducibility: yes. for the patch defect by source inspection: the parser gates usage.record rows on a top-level model field, so rows without that field are dropped. Live Kimi provider behavior was not probed because repository policy avoids unrequested real-account validation.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Human review remains because missing contributor proof and Kimi auth-source acceptance cannot be repaired automatically, even though the parser fallback is a concrete contributor fix.

target.title: Improve Kimi Code usage reporting
target.body:
## Summary

Improves Kimi Code usage reporting in CodexBar by aligning the Kimi provider with the upstream open-source Kimi Code implementation and `pi-provider-kimi-code`.

Main changes:

- Supports Kimi Code OAuth credentials from `~/.kimi-code/credentials/kimi-code.json`
- Refreshes expired Kimi Code OAuth access tokens while preserving unknown CLI-owned credential fields
- Keeps explicit Kimi API-key mode API-key only; OAuth credential fallback is limited to auto mode
- Shows the active Kimi source:
  - Kimi Code credential
  - Kimi Code API key
  - Kimi web cookie
- Preserves Kimi quota windows from `limits[]` and shows Session before Weekly
- Adds daily Kimi token usage from local usage records:
  - Kimi Code `sessions/**/wire.jsonl`
  - Pi session records for Kimi providers
- Adds settings toggles for Kimi Code and Pi local usage sources
- Estimates local Kimi usage cost with `pi-provider-kimi-code` pricing
- Shows Kimi membership tier and fast mode as:
  - `Tier: Allegretto`
  - `Tier: Allegretto / Fast`

This keeps Kimi Code separate from Moonshot, Kimi K2, and generic Kimi API providers.

## Upstream alignment

This PR follows the upstream Kimi Code implementation rather than inferring a separate protocol:

- Kimi Code OAuth credential storage under `~/.kimi-code/credentials`: https://github.com/MoonshotAI/kimi-code/blob/3ea6ac278d2e57bb859ab423704bbd0fb2033c72/packages/oauth/src/storage.ts#L4-L6
- Kimi Code token save path and permissions: https://github.com/MoonshotAI/kimi-code/blob/3ea6ac278d2e57bb859ab423704bbd0fb2033c72/packages/oauth/src/storage.ts#L90-L108
- Kimi Code usage endpoint: https://github.com/MoonshotAI/kimi-code/blob/3ea6ac278d2e57bb859ab423704bbd0fb2033c72/packages/oauth/src/managed-usage.ts#L23-L39
- Kimi Code `usage.record` writes a model field: https://github.com/MoonshotAI/kimi-code/blob/3ea6ac278d2e57bb859ab423704bbd0fb2033c72/packages/agent-core/src/agent/usage/index.ts#L26-L32
- Kimi Code wire type requires `usage.record.model`: https://github.com/MoonshotAI/kimi-code/blob/3ea6ac278d2e57bb859ab423704bbd0fb2033c72/packages/agent-core/src/agent/records/types.ts#L68-L72

The same endpoint and OAuth behavior are also used by `pi-provider-kimi-code`:

- Base URL and `KIMI_CODE_HOME`: https://github.com/Leechael/pi-provider-kimi-code/blob/89a5481f74d0b558a65d6bc0a71d923b266c2e7d/src/constants.ts#L38-L56
- OAuth host/base URL environment handling: https://github.com/Leechael/pi-provider-kimi-code/blob/89a5481f74d0b558a65d6bc0a71d923b266c2e7d/src/constants.ts#L66-L75
- OAuth refresh flow: https://github.com/Leechael/pi-provider-kimi-code/blob/89a5481f74d0b558a65d6bc0a71d923b266c2e7d/src/oauth.ts#L130-L169

## Privacy

Local session scanning only aggregates usage records. It does not display raw prompts or session content.

## Validation

- `./Scripts/lint.sh format`
- `swift test --filter "Kimi" --skip-update`
- `swift test --filter "PiSessionCostScannerTests|ProviderSettingsDescriptorTests|Kimi" --skip-update`
- `swift test --filter "fetcher merges native and pi codex history with normalized model names|fetcher merges native and pi claude history and ignores unsupported pi providers|fetcher maps Pi Kimi sessions into Kimi usage when Pi source is enabled" --skip-update`
- `make check`
- `git diff --check`
- `./Scripts/compile_and_run.sh`
target.author: leechael
